title: Paediatric Speech Therapist
description:
We are seeking an experienced and dedicated Speech Therapist to join our dynamics team in delivering outstanding results for our clients and their families, using the latest research and innovative tools to create customised therapy plans and help us to redefine the future of healthcare.

Key Responsibilities:

  1. Conduct assessments for speech, language, communication, and feeding concerns in children, including developmental delays, ASD, and sensory-based feeding challenges.
  2. Develop and deliver individualised therapy plans for communication and feeding goals, including developmental feeding skills and safe swallowing support.
  3. Provide therapy via 1:1 sessions and group sessions, tailored to each child’s needs and real-life participation.
  4. Use our in-house software to manage care plans, track progress, and support ongoing therapy—designed to streamline documentation and reduce admin load.
  5. Coach parents/caregivers with practical strategies for carryover at home (communication and/or mealtime routines).
  6. Collaborate with families, educators, and multidisciplinary partners to support each child’s development and functional goals.
  7. Maintain clear clinical documentation and contribute to a high-quality, outcomes-driven service.


What we Offer:

  • Full-time/ Part Time / Locum available
  •  We believe in recognizing your dedication and expertise. Enjoy a highly competitive salary package that reflects your commitment to changing children’s lives.
  • Access cutting-edge tools and technology that enhance therapy outcomes and reduce workload, while allowing you the freedom to use tried-and-true methods you trust.
  • Work directly with children, helping them develop the crucial communication skills that will shape their futures.
  • We focus on actual client needs and outcomes. Your role is to empower each child and family in the most effective, empathetic way possible.

Requirement

  • Bachelor’s or master’s degree in Speech Language Therapy from a recognized accredited institution.
  • Minimum 2 year of hands-on experience in speech therapy, preferably with children. Fresh graduates with hands-on experience in paediatric settings or placements are encouraged to apply, as we value the passion and dedication you bring to the table.
  • Valid AHPC (Allied Health Professions Council) registration or eligibility for registration in Singapore.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with a strong ability to connect with children and their families.
  • Ability to work collaboratively with a multidisciplinary team.
  • Compassionate, patient-centered approach with a commitment to enhancing the quality of life for children.
  • Fluency in English and proficiency in additional languages is a plus.

Interested parties, please send your resume with current & expected salary and availability to agnes_ho@therapy.com.sg. We regret only shortlisted applicants will be notified.

http://www.dynamics.com.sg

postedCompany.description: DYNAMICS THERAPY CENTRE FOR KIDS PTE. LTD is an Multidisciplinary Therapy practice located in Orchard Road. It provides Speech Theray, Occupational Therapy, as well as educational services and social skills training for children.
postedCompany.name: DYNAMICS THERAPY CENTRE FOR KIDS PTE. LTD.
